name: Password reset tokens (single-use, TTL)
task: Create /tmp/eval_pr/pr.py with class PasswordResetTokens(ttl=900). Method issue(user_id, now) returns a fresh URL-safe token string and stores its SHA-256 hash internally with expiry (now + ttl). Method verify(token, now) returns user_id on a valid match (consuming the token — single-use), or None if missing/expired. The plaintext token must NOT be retained, only its hash.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_pr/pr.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); p = mod.PasswordResetTokens(ttl=600); tok = p.issue(user_id=42, now=1000); assert p.verify(tok, now=1100) == 42; assert p.verify(tok, now=1100) is None; tok2 = p.issue(user_id=42, now=2000); assert p.verify(tok2, now=3000) is None; print('OK')
